fix_attempts.bsd-3-clause-alt-variant: 2026-04-24: Created draft PR for BSD-3-Clause alt clause fix. Added minimum_matching_confidence to License, minimum_confidence_for to Dice matcher. 2828 tests pass, 0 rubocop offenses.
